texto: It is the tragedy of a distinguished mind and a generous nature that have gone unappreciated in a conventional, unimaginative world. A victim of men's incomprehension of women, a symptom of women's mistrust of men.
explicacao: Citação de Francis Wyndham sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “It is the tragedy of a distinguished mind and a generous nature that have gone unappreciated in a…” articula reflexao, verdade, women em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
